response: Imagine you have a completely flat red soccer ball. You need to slide it into one of two openings: a perfectly circular hole or a wide, rectangular slot. Which opening would you choose?

meta.system: Reword this puzzle in a different natural style, SAME facts, SAME question. Reply ONLY the reworded text.
meta.user: You have a deflated red football. Put it into one of these holes: the round one, or the flat slot. Which one?
